Description: Authors' curated dataset (Tan et al., 2025) covering Jan-Nov 2023, 64 airports
Restrict to study window: June + July 2023
Retain flights with ORIGIN in 30 Large hubs (FAA CY2021 enplanements)
Closed-network filter: DEST in 60-airport sample (30 Large + 15 Medium + 15 Small)
Raw BTS On-Time Reporting: June + July 2023 (all U.S. carriers)
Retain flights with ORIGIN in 15 Medium or 15 Small hubs
Concatenate Large (568,539) + Medium (112,998) + Small (39,994); merge weather (IEM ASOS), traffic (+/-1 h windows), turnaround features
Drop rows with missing DEP_DEL15 label (cancelled / diverted flights)
Merge monthly network centrality (betweenness, closeness) by (ORIGIN, MONTH)
Merge hourly ANSP Delay_Score (alpha=0.85, beta=2.3, gamma=0.9) by (ORIGIN, Scheduled_DEP_EST floored to hour)
